Author: Sushii-dev (originally by grimgrum)
Name: Veiled Aim (BDO + ER)
Description: BDO-style cursor-driven action camera with Elden Ring-style soft targeting. Press a key to hide the cursor — your character auto-faces the camera, the mouse rotates it freely, and the most-centred hostile enemy in your field of view becomes a soft target (yellow outline + red ring, ReAction Field Target / Soft Target pronoun compatible). Any UI popup that shows the cursor pauses the camera; press the key again to resume. Configurable hard-target keybind with cone-pause, click-to-target suppression, and per-scenario auto-resume exemptions. v0.6.0 adds BETA mouse-bind hotbar fire — bind LMB/RMB/MMB/XBUTTON (+ optional Shift/Ctrl/Alt) to any hotbar slot, gated to active camera + cursor hidden. Off by default. Originally forked from grimgrum/action-cam-for-FFXIV.
